description_long: This sconce features an elongated, vertically oriented, oval-shaped shade with a gently ribbed or pleated surface texture, giving it a soft, lantern-like appearance. The shade is suspended from a thin, straight cord or wire, which extends upward, suggesting a pendant-style mounting. The top of the shade is capped with a small, rounded finial that transitions smoothly into the cord. The material appears to be a frosted or matte glass or plastic, diffusing light softly and evenly. The overall design is simple and elegant, with a focus on clean lines and subtle surface detailing. This fixture would blend seamlessly into modern or minimalist urban environments, providing ambient or accent lighting.
description: A vertically elongated, ribbed sconce with a frosted shade suspended from a thin cord, featuring a minimalist and elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full oval shade, ribbed texture, and the cord extending directly upward.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the ribbed texture and oval shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, maintaining the same ribbed, elongated form and cord attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the ribbed surface and overall symmetry of the sconce.
attribute_fixture_design: Minimalist and modern, with a clean, ribbed frosted shade and simple suspension cord, evoking a contemporary lantern aesthetic.
